sections.sectionTitle: David in Zif-ah Saul Suaktasak Kik

verses.text: Tua ciangin Saul kiang Gibeah-ah Zif mite hong pai uh a, “Jeshimon nisuahna lam Hakhilah mualtungah David bu hilo ahi hiam?” va ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul kithawi-in David a zong dingin Israel mi a kiteel mihing tul thum tawh Zif gamlakah a paisuk hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Jeshimon nisuahna lam lampi gei-ah a om Hakhilah mualtungah giahphual sat hi. Ahih hangin gamlakah David omlai hi. Amah a delhin gamlakah Saul a hong paina thu a theih ciangin
David in thukan simte sawl a, Saul hong pai taktak ahihna thu a thei hi

Tua ciangin David dingin Saul in giahphual a satna munah a pai hi. David in Saul' galkapmangpa, Ner' tapa Abner tawh a lupna mun mu hi. Giahphual laizangah Saul lum a, ama kimkotah a galkapte in phual sat uh hi

Tua ciangin David in Hit mi Ahimelek leh a nu uh Zeruiah ahi Joab' sanggampa Abishai kiangah, “Saul' giahphualah kei tawh kua hong paisuk ding na hi uh hiam” a ci hi. Abishai in, “Kei nang tawh kong paisuk ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David leh Abishai zanin galkapte kiangah pai uh hi. Giahphual sungah Saul na ihmu a, a lukhung leilakah a teipi na kiphut a, Abner leh galkapte ama kimkotah na lum uh hi
Tua ciangin Abishai in David kiangah, “Pasian in na galpa tuni-in na khutsungah hong pia ahih ciangin tu-in teipi-in lei tawh khatvei bek hong khawhcipsak in, nihvei khawh ding kisamlo hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin David in Abishai kiangah, “Ama tungah siatna bawl kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' sathau nilhpa a su peuhpeuh mawhna pan peng ding sa na hi hiam?” a ci hi
David in, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin Topa in amah vat taktak ding hi; tua ahih kei leh zong a sih hun hong tung ding hi; tua ahih kei leh gal kikapna sungah amah paisukin si ding hi
Topa' sathau nilhpa tungah ka khut ka ngak ding Topa in kei hong kham hi; ahih hangin tu-in a lukhungah a om a teipi leh a tuithawl la-in paikhia ni,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin David in Saul' lukhunga a om a teipi leh a tuithawl a la hi. Tua ciangin amaute paikhia uh hi. Kuamah in mulo hi; zong theilo hi; kuamah khanglo lo hi. Amaute khempeuh ihmu uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute ihmut suak mahmah sak hi
Tua ciangin David a pang khatah pai-in, amaute kikal saupi a kihalin mual dawn a gamla-ah a ding hi
David in galkapte leh Ner' tapa Abner samin, “Abner aw, hong dawnglo ding na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Abner in dawngin, “Kumpipa a sam kua na hi hiam?” a ci hi

David in Abner kiangah, “Pasal hilo na hi hiam? Israel-te sungah nang tawh a kibang kua om ahi hiam? Tua ahih leh bang hangin na to kumpipa villo na hi hiam? Bang hang hiam cih leh na to kumpipa a that dingin mi khat hong pai hi

Hih banga na gamtatna hoihlo hi. Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin a si dingin na kilawm hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' sathau nilhpa, na topa na vil kei hi. Tu-in a lukhunga om kumpipa' teipi leh a tuithawl koi-ah om ahi hiam, thei in,” a ci hi
Saul in David' aw khenthei a, “Ka tapa David, tu-a a ging nangma' aw ahi hiam?” a ci hi. David in, “Ka topa, kumpipa aw, keima' aw ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Bang hangin ka topa in a nasempa delh ahi hiam? Bang gamta khial ka hi hiam? Ka tungah bang mawhna om ahi hiam

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka to kumpipa in a nasempa' thu za in. Keimah a do dingin nang hong toksuahpa pen Topa ahih leh amah in biakna hong sang ta hen; ahih hangin mihing ahih leh amaute in Topa' mai-ah samsiatna ngah ta hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, ‘Pai in; pasian dangte' na sem in,’ ci-in Topa' gamh ka ngahlohna dingin tuni-in kei hong hawlkhia uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa' omna panin gamdang leitangah kei hong sisak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh mualtungah vaka a bengpa bangin uili bang lel keimah a that dingin Israel kumpipa nong kuankhia hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Saul in, “Ka gamta khial hi; hong ciahkik in, ka tapa David aw; bang hang hiam cih leh tuni-in kei hong suaktasak na hih manin na tungah siatna kong bawl nawn kei ding hi. Ka hai gamtatkha a, nakpi takin ka khial khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in dawngin, “Hih lai-ah na teipi om hi, kumpipa! Tangvalte khat hong paisak in la hong lasak in

Topa in mi khempeuh a thumanna leh a thutakna hangin thaman pia hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in tuni-in ka khutsungah nang hong pia a, keimah in Topa' sathau nilhpa a hih dingin ka khutte ka tangkhiasak kei hi
En in, tuni-in nangmah kong suahtaksak mah bangin Topa in zong kei hong suaktasak hen la, haksatna khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia ta hen,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Saul in David kiangah, “Thupha ngah ta in, ka tapa David! Nangmah in na tampi na sem ding a, tuate na zo ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin David ama lampi-ah pai-in, Saul zong ama omna munah a ciah hi.
